issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 10 dmg (53% of 19 HP) on floor 6
issues.description: At turn seq 372 (floor 6, encounter 2, turn 4), the enemy dealt 10 damage when the player had 19 HP. This is 53% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 10 damage (53% of player's 19 HP)

issues.title: 3 consecutive encounters with >90% HP (floors 1-1)
issues.description: Encounters 0 through 2 (3 in a row) ended with the player above 90% HP (>72). This suggests these encounters provide no meaningful challenge. Encounters: f1e0(HP=80), f1e1(HP=76), f1e2(HP=76).

issues.title: Systemic combo cap bug: maxCombo=3 despite 88.8% accuracy (expert)
issues.description: The expert player achieved 88.8% overall accuracy across 18 encounters, yet maxCombo never exceeded 3. Every single run across ALL profiles shows maxCombo capped at exactly 3, indicating a hard cap bug in the combo system. The combo multiplier progression (1.0x->1.15x->1.3x->1.5x->2.0x) is unreachable beyond combo 3, removing a core damage scaling mechanic.
reproductionSteps: Answer 4+ questions correctly in a single turn
issues.suggestedFix: Investigate combo counter reset logic — likely resets at end of each turn or encounter instead of persisting across consecutive correct answers within a turn. Check if hand size (typically 3-5 cards) is capping combos.

issues.title: Difficulty spike: the_excavator on floor 3 took 11 turns (prev floor avg: 3.7)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 3 against the_excavator (boss) required 11 turns to resolve, which is 3.0x the previous floor's average of 3.7 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold for difficulty spikes. The player dealt 119 damage and took 39.
issues.suggestedFix: Review the_excavator HP/damage scaling for floor 3; consider smoother difficulty curve for boss enemies

issues.title: Difficulty spike: bone_collector on floor 5 took 9 turns (prev floor avg: 3.3)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 5 against bone_collector (mini_boss) required 9 turns to resolve, which is 2.7x the previous floor's average of 3.3 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold for difficulty spikes. The player dealt 81 damage and took 16.
issues.suggestedFix: Review bone_collector HP/damage scaling for floor 5; consider smoother difficulty curve for mini_boss enemies

issues.title: expert defeated on floor 6 with 88.8% accuracy — mid-game scaling too harsh
issues.description: An expert player with 88.8% accuracy should not lose on floor 6. The run ended after 18 encounters. Combined with the combo cap bug (maxCombo=3), damage output cannot keep pace with enemy HP scaling, creating an unwinnable attrition war.
issues.suggestedFix: Fix combo cap bug to unlock higher damage multipliers; review mid-game enemy HP scaling
